name: libcss-perl
title: libcss-perl
summary: object oriented access to Cascading Style Sheets (CSS)
description:
object oriented access to Cascading Style Sheets (CSS)
This module can be used, along with a CSS::Parse::* module, to parse
CSS data and represent it as a tree of objects. Using a CSS::Adaptor::*
module, the CSS data tree can then be transformed into other formats.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libcss-perl because object oriented access to Cascading Style Sheets (CSS).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libcss-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libcss-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libcss-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
